{{Quote|You're worse than a kriffing zucca pig!|[[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel's]] father insulting his son|<ref name="PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>}}
The '''zucca boar''' or '''zucca pig''' was a large [[Swine|pig]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWG" /> A muscular beast, it was slightly larger than the average [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rat]], but not nearly as dexterous.<ref name="TRoD">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref> Although the creature was [[Diet/Legends|herbivorous]],<ref name="SWG" /> it had thick skin and dangerous tusks.<ref name="TRoD" /> Nevertheless, the animal was often considered as as an example of easy prey.<ref name="PoD" /><ref name="RoT">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|For dessert, Zucca Fruit Pastries. No common zucca meat, get a wild boar. I'd say you could go buy some, but Jabba won't eat something we paid for.|[[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]]|<ref name="SWG:JPP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Jabba's Palace : Porcellus|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
[[File:Desert_razorback.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A desert razorback]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] cook, [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]], used zucca meat to make [[zucca fruit pastry]].<ref name="SWG:JPP" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the proprietors of the [[Aerie Casino]] featured an animal fight between a zucca boar and a womp rat as part of their grand-opening celebration. The womp rat, though smaller, won the contest.<ref name="TRoD" />

The comparison to a zucca pig was also used as an insult.<ref name="PoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zucca boars appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
